appliedUpdates.description: Updated user-testing.md to reflect Streamlit surface (replaced FreqUI/FastAPI documentation with Streamlit-specific guidance)

notes: Round 2 of user testing for streamlit-pivot milestone. Previous round (round 1) found VAL-UI-007 and VAL-CROSS-001 failed because CAGR was displayed instead of Sortino Ratio. Fix was applied in commit 017652f. This round confirms all 11 assertions now pass. Sortino Ratio is correctly displayed in the Performance Summary section.
